title: Future belongs to genomics driven ‘personalised medical prescriptions’: Dr Jitendra
description: NXT Summit 2026 Excelsior Correspondent NEW DELHI, Mar 13: Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences and Minister of State in PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space Dr. Jitendra Singh today said that India is entering a transformative era of personalised and precision medicine powered by genomics, artificial intelligence, and advanced biotechnology, which will enable early detection of diseases and targeted treatment even before symptoms appear. title: CLUJ signs MoU to set up ‘Future of Work Lab’
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 13: Cluster University of Jammu (CLUJ) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Employability life, a subsidiary of Federation University Australia, to establish a “Future of Work Lab” aimed at enhancing global career readiness among students. A statement said the collaboration will provide students with industry-aligned, work-simulated projects across fields such as management, commerce, biotechnology, cybersecurity and artificial intelligence, helping them gain practical exposure to real-world workplace challenges. Under the programme, students will also receive […]

title: Review: 'The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist' is a panic attack, in a good way
description: How worried should you be about the rise of artificial intelligence?
